TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Si'ung ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 3 buwan, 35 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 77% kyan ku 27 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 23% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 10/13 . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Si'ung hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Si'ung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Si'ung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Si'ung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Si'ung hya' ga T'apan. tay 'zil na Si'ung hya' ga Blangaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēi ĒuŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a * ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, **/** . maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a t Ēapan. taj Ēzil na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a ő≤laŇčaw. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Si'ung ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 3 buwan, 35 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 77% kyan ku 27 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 23% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 10/13 . maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Si'ung hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Si'ung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Si'ung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Si'ung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Si'ung hya' ga T'apan. tay 'zil na Si'ung hya' ga Blangaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēi ĒuŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a * ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, **/** . maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a t Ēapan. taj Ēzil na s~…ēi ĒuŇč ńßja Ē …£a ő≤laŇčaw. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
